title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build agentic AI applications using Claude Code across three interfaces: desktop app, terminal, and VS Code extension. The example project is an AI Resume and Cover Letter Generator that demonstrates features like Plan Mode, memory files, context window management, and local execution with FastAPI.
